description: A customer service agent discovers a customer has two online accounts (e.g., one with a typo in the email). The accounts need to be merged.

nodes.task_description: Identify the two duplicate accounts in the customer management system.

expected_outcome.value: The agent confirms both accounts belong to the same person.

nodes.task_description: Select the primary account to keep and the secondary account to be merged.

expected_outcome.value: The agent chooses the account with the correct email as the primary.

nodes.task_description: Initiate the account merge, which combines the order history and loyalty points into the primary account.

expected_outcome.value: The customer now has a single, unified account with all their historical data.
